_publications._publicationTitle: The draft genome of the Wisconsin Miniature SwineTM, a valuable biomedical research tool.

_contextSnippet: The WMS TM draft assembly achieved a BUSCO score of 98.2% ([S:97.9%, D:0.3%], F:1.0%, M:0.8%)...The BUSCO assessment of the assembly generated here surpasses the BUSCO scores for existing S. scrofa reference genomes (Sscrofa11.1 = 93.8% and USMARCv1.0 = 93.1%)
details: WMS TM draft assembly achieved BUSCO score of 98.2% ([S:97.9%, D:0.3%], F:1.0%, M:0.8%), surpassing existing S. scrofa reference genomes (Sscrofa11.1 = 93.8% and USMARCv1.0 = 93.1%)
